stars.title: North Opening
stars.answer: Yes. The gate is already loosening.

stars.title: Clear Ember
stars.answer: Yes. Begin before doubt rebuilds the wall.

stars.title: Stride Meridian
stars.answer: Move now; momentum is part of the blessing.

stars.title: Swift Lantern
stars.answer: The road clarifies by walking, not waiting.

stars.title: Inner Compass
stars.answer: Trust the signal that arrives quietly and keeps returning.

stars.title: Flame Witness
stars.answer: Your first honest reading is the correct one.

stars.title: Glass Horizon
stars.answer: Name the choice plainly and confusion will retreat.

stars.title: Silver Line
stars.answer: A single clean boundary reveals the whole shape.

stars.title: Veil Break
stars.answer: What was hidden is ready to step into speech.

stars.title: Open Archive
stars.answer: A truth you suspected will now confirm itself.

stars.title: Anchor Oath
stars.answer: Choose one path and feed it with consistency.

stars.title: Bound Thread
stars.answer: A clear promise will unlock your next step.

stars.title: Tide Delay
stars.answer: Not yet. Let timing align with intent.

stars.title: Late Bell
stars.answer: Wait one cycle. Premature action will blur the gain.

stars.title: Fog Prism
stars.answer: The question is still mixed. Refine it before deciding.

stars.title: Soft Static
stars.answer: There is signal here, but not yet a verdict.

stars.title: Covered Star
stars.answer: A missing detail is steering the outcome.

stars.title: Quiet Chamber
stars.answer: Something essential remains unspoken; listen again.

stars.title: Threshold Mark
stars.answer: Proceed, but secure your boundary first.

stars.title: Copper Warning
stars.answer: Slow your pace; one unseen cost is still attached.

stars.title: Mirror Basin
stars.answer: The next answer appears after honest self-naming.

stars.title: Still Ink
stars.answer: Write what you fear and the path will simplify.

stars.title: Slow Orchard
stars.answer: Growth is active, even if motion is quiet.

stars.title: Long Breath
stars.answer: Do less, but do it for longer.

stars.title: Open Gate
stars.answer: An invitation is already near; answer it actively.

stars.title: Rising Current
stars.answer: A new version of your aim is surfacing now.

stars.title: Molting Moon
stars.answer: Release the old method; the same goal wants new form.

stars.title: Shift Spiral
stars.answer: Transformation asks for participation, not observation.

stars.title: Door of Echoes
stars.answer: Say yes to the conversation that stretches you.

stars.title: Searchlight
stars.answer: Follow curiosity for one week and track what repeats.

stars.title: Wide Meridian
stars.answer: Your field can hold more than your current frame.

stars.title: Lantern Arc
stars.answer: Expand your reach; support appears at the edge.

stars.title: Held Reins
stars.answer: A small refusal now protects a larger yes later.

stars.title: Quiet Interval
stars.answer: Pause intentionally; the next signal is still assembling.

stars.title: Dust Veil
stars.answer: Your path is present, but obscured by divided attention.

stars.title: Clouded Needle
stars.answer: Direction exists; your instrument needs recalibration.

stars.title: Later Bell
stars.answer: Ask again later; your question has not settled.

stars.title: Split Path
stars.answer: Two intentions are competing; choose one before moving.

stars.title: Silent Gate
stars.answer: Wait without abandoning the intention.

stars.title: Soft Green Light
stars.answer: Yes, quietly. Begin small and keep fidelity.

stars.title: Second Lens
stars.answer: Gather one more piece of evidence before deciding.

stars.title: Stone River
stars.answer: Trust the slow route; it is building a stronger base.

stars.title: Hammer Star
stars.answer: A bold move is possible, but only with full clarity.

stars.title: Spark Command
stars.answer: If you move now, commit with no half-step.

stars.title: Clock of Moss
stars.answer: Timing, not force, will open this outcome.

stars.title: Sudden Lamp
stars.answer: A revelation is near, but it asks stillness first.
